name: Audiobooks: Check closing playback speed and sleep timer
fullName: Audiobooks in A1QA library: Audiobooks: Check closing playback speed and sleep timer
statusMessage: Button 'Listen' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -
statusTrace:

testStage.statusMessage: Button 'Listen' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -
testStage.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Button 'Listen' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -

steps.name: Given  I turn on test mode in "Palace Bookshelf" library
When  Enable hidden libraries
And  I open Catalog
And  I add "A1QA Test Library" account by the logo
Then  Account "A1QA Test Library" is present on Accounts screen
When  I enter credentials for "A1QA Test Library" account
Then  Login is performed successfully
When  I open Catalog
And  I open search modal
When  I search for "The Lost Symbol" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  I check that book contains LISTEN action button on book details screen
steps.statusMessage: Button 'Listen' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Button 'Listen' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) - 
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.checkThatBookContainsActionButton(BookDetailsSteps.java:100)
	at ✽.I check that book contains LISTEN action button on book details screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/AudiobookOverdrive.feature:127)

steps.name: When  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  The speed by default is 1.0
When  Open playback speed on audio player screen
And  Close playback speed screen
Then  Play button is present on audio player screen
When  Set END_OF_CHAPTER sleep timer on sleep timer audiobook screen
Then  Sleep timer is set to endOfChapter on audio player screen
When  Open sleep timer on audio player screen
And  Close sleep timer screen
Then  Play button is present on audio player screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Audiobooks: Check closing playback speed and sleep timer

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Audiobooks: Check closing playback speed and sleep timer
